ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete participating in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed during the session */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach overseeing the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the session */,
  "indoor_outdoor" TEXT /* Whether the session was indoors or outdoors */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  "injury_risk" REAL /* Predicted injury risk for the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_activity_type FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the athlete competes in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* History of injuries */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Key performance metrics */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the athlete has */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team competes in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of athletes in the team */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Home arena or stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "activity_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the activity */,
  "activity_requirements" TEXT /* Equipment and conditions required for the activity */,
  "activity_benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of performing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the classification */,
  "classification_source" TEXT /* Source of the classification data */,
  "classification_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)
